title: HDL Model of a 4-bit Full Adder using Multiplexers
description: A block diagram showing how a 4-bit full adder can be constructed from 1-bit full adder modules, which in turn are implemented using multiplexers for the sum and carry-out logic.
elements: Logic Gates (AND, OR, NOT for MUX inputs)
relationships: 4x 1-bit Full Adders are connected in series to form a ripple-carry adder
Each 1-bit Full Adder uses two 4:1 MUXes to compute Sum and Cout
The Cout of one adder becomes the Cin of the next
The MUXes select the correct output based on the truth table inputs A, B, and Cin
